behaviors.description: Speech-to-text preserves speaker labels for attendee attribution.
behaviors.justification: LLM-DEP/AI-CALL-DEFAULT applies at the STT stage: speaker diarization quality is model output, and a stubbed transcript would hide real diarization failures (MOCK-HIDE). Rejected Workflow because this behavior targets one model-dependent boundary (STT label fidelity), not multiple agentic decisions in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real multi-speaker meeting audio through the production STT API and assert transcript utterances retain correct speaker labels needed for downstream attendee attribution.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text).
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is parser logic on transcript text (MOCK-MISS says this is local function behavior). No real OS/network/subprocess or model-output dependence is required to surface extraction bugs. Rejected Integration because behavior text is about parsing/extraction itself, not inter-module handoff.
behaviors.test_description: Feed representative transcript lines into the parsing function/object and assert extracted assignment records include assignee and task text with expected normalization/edge-case handling.

behaviors.description: Live summary includes at least one action item per attendee who was assigned a task.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM content decisions (whether it emits action items per assigned attendee). Deterministic stubs can verify routing but cannot validate omission/hallucination behavior (deterministic-assertion trap). Rejected Workflow because this can be validated with one real summarization step from a prepared transcript/structured input.
behaviors.test_description: Provide a transcript/input with known assignments across multiple attendees to the real summarization model and assert output has >=1 action item for each assigned attendee.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into `decisions` schema, not narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: This is deterministic routing/schema-mapping logic after decisions are identified; failure is local logic, not real infra or model quality. Rejected Agentic because behavior text says "routes identified decisions" (identification quality is out of scope here).
behaviors.test_description: Call the decision-routing mapper with pre-identified decision objects and assert they land only in the `decisions` section schema and not generic narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key transcript decisions appear in live summary `decisions` section, not buried in narrative.
behaviors.justification: Behavior evaluates model output quality/content placement in live summary. A mock summary would always pass expected placement and hide real misses. Rejected Workflow because one real summarization pass can expose this failure without requiring multi-agentic stage sequencing.
behaviors.test_description: Send a transcript containing explicit decisions to the real summarization model and assert those decisions are present in `decisions` section and absent from narrative-only placement.

behaviors.description: For audio >60 minutes, service segments, processes sequentially, and merges into one coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: This behavior chains multiple model-dependent steps across segments plus merge coherence checks (MULTI-STEP + LLM-DEP). Integration tests with stubs can validate split/merge mechanics but miss coherence failures that emerge only across sequential real model outputs.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real >60-minute recording through production segmentation + sequential STT/summarization pipeline and assert all segments are processed in order and merged output remains coherent and structurally complete.

behaviors.description: End-to-end pipeline (upload, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) runs unattended on a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: By definition this is full pipeline execution with multiple agentic steps (STT then LLM summarization) plus real infrastructure boundaries. Lower levels cannot catch cross-stage orchestration and output-quality regressions together.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the full production path on a real recording: upload audio, run STT, run summarization, and verify structured output is delivered without manual intervention and with required sections populated.
